title: Trump Zigzags on Iran, Claiming ‘Great Progress’ but Making Threats
summary_full: President Trump threatened to hit vital infrastructure in Iran if the Strait of Hormuz was not reopened, but he also said that “regime change” had already been achieved.
summary_public: President Trump threatened to hit vital infrastructure in Iran if the Strait of Hormuz was not reopened, but he also said that “regime change” had already been achieved.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: threatened to hit vital infrastructure in Iran
